home.heroTitle:
AI-Powered Try On.
Confident Shopping.
Fewer Returns.
home.heroSubtitle: Kalza helps fashion brands deliver personalized size recommendations and virtual try-on experiences that increase conversion and reduce returns.
home.retailProblemBody: In apparel e-commerce, return rates exceed 30% (vs 8–10% in physical stores). Shoppers can't try on, and every return means lost revenue, reverse logistics overhead, and a real environmental footprint.
home.retailStat3Label: Carbon footprint emitted by returns transportation and logistics
home.shopperProblemTitle: Buying clothes online shouldn't feel like a gamble
home.shopperProblemBody: Shoppers don't want to go through the hassle of returning an item because the size didn't fit or the garment didn't look the way they expected.
home.shopperPain1Body: Every brand uses its own chart; an M at one store is an L at another.
home.shopperPain2Body: Repackage, ship back, wait for the refund. Time wasted.
home.shopperPain3Body: The garment looks different in the photo than it does at home.
home.partnersTitle: Brands already reducing returns with Kalza
home.finalCtaBody: Integrate Kalza in less than a week. Zero friction for your shoppers, zero changes to your catalog.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Modular technology built for fashion e-commerce
products.kalzaDescription: Embeddable widget that integrates with your site via a script tag. Combines AI size recommendation and realistic virtual try-on in a single flow.
products.kalzaFeature2: Works with Shopify, WooCommerce and your custom brand site
products.kalzaFeature3: Fully themable to match your brand
products.futureBody: We are building more tools for fashion ecosystem. Subscribe to be the first to know.

solutions.title: Solutions
solutions.subtitle: Two AI layers working together to solve returns
solutions.sizeBody: Our engine cross-references the shopper's measurements with each garment's size chart and learns from historical return data to deliver a personalized recommendation with a confidence score.
solutions.sizeStep1: Shopper enters height, weight and key measurements
solutions.sizeStep2: We cross-reference the product size chart and historical data
solutions.sizeStep3: We return recommended size with confidence score
solutions.tryOnBody: The shopper uploads a photo and our model generates a realistic image of how the garment would look on them, respecting proportions, colors and fabric characteristics.
solutions.tryOnStep1: Shopper uploads a full-body front photo
solutions.tryOnStep2: We render the virtual try-on in under 30 seconds
solutions.tryOnStep3: Shopper decides with confidence before buying
solutions.techNote: Latency target: 30s for 95% of cases · User data is encrypted

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Portal access and partner brands
customers.portalBody: Sign in to your panel to review usage, products, subscription, analytics and widget configuration.
customers.partnersBody: We work with boutiques and fashion retailers committed to elevating the online buying experience.
customers.mosaliBody: Premium women's fashion boutique. Early adopters of the Kalza widget.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple, predictable plans. No per-transaction fees.
pricing.starterTagline: For shops getting started with try-on
pricing.growthTagline: For growing brands with an active catalog
pricing.enterpriseTagline: High volume, custom integration and SLA
pricing.faq1A: No. Widget integration is via script tag. We only charge setup on Enterprise plans that require custom integration.
pricing.faq2Q: What happens if I exceed my generation limit?
pricing.faq2A: We notify you at 80% usage. You can upgrade at any time or pay overage per generation.
pricing.faq3A: Yes. No lock-in. Cancel from the portal and keep access until the end of your billing period.
pricing.faq4A: Yes. AES-256 encryption, JWT with expiration, HTTPS/TLS and Chilean Law 19.628 compliance.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: We build technology to close the gap between buying in a physical store and buying online
about.storyP1: Kalza was born from a persistent problem in fashion e-commerce: more than a third of garments sold online end up returned. Behind that statistic are frustrated shoppers, retailers losing margin and a massive environmental cost.
about.storyP2: We believe generative AI and recommendation models can close the gap between buying in a physical store and buying online. That is Kalza's mission.
about.value1Body: Every recommendation must be explainable and traceable. We don't make promises we can't back with data.
about.value2Body: Shopper photos and measurements are sensitive data. We treat them that way, always.
about.value3Body: Every avoided return is avoided CO₂. We measure environmental impact as a product metric.
about.teamBody: A small team with deep experience in applied AI, digital commerce and product building.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your brand and we'll get back to you in less than 24 business hours.
contact.name: Name
contact.messagePlaceholder: What are you trying to solve with Kalza?
contact.successBody: Thanks. We'll get back to you within 24 business hours.
contact.errorBody: Please try again in a few minutes or email us at soporte.kalza@gmail.com

demo.title: Book a demo
demo.subtitle: 30 minutes to show you Kalza live on a product from your catalog.
demo.successBody: We'll email you available slots within the next 24 hours.
